target_0.brief_supporting_logic: Visible debris field at base; significant facade collapse; multiple windows and roof sections missing; structural framing appears intact but non-load-bearing elements extensively damaged; damage exceeds 45% of visible target element area.

target_1.brief_supporting_logic: The target building shows complete collapse of its upper structure; debris piles at ground level; structural framing is missing; facade is entirely gone; consistent with 75-100% damage per doctrinal definition for framed buildings.

summary: Two buildings assessed: one with SEVERE DAMAGE (CONFIRMED) showing significant facade collapse and missing windows/roof, and one DESTROYED (CONFIRMED) with complete upper structure collapse and missing framing. The overall scene depicts a street-level view of heavily damaged urban structures with rubble and debris, a single intact car parked in front, and no visible functional infrastructure. The damage to the buildings suggests the area is non-operational and likely uninhabitable.
